items.summary: Coordinate incident response, timeline capture, and postmortem handoff with a read-only operational checklist.
items.releaseNotes: Refined timeline prompts and stakeholder update template.

inlineFiles.content:
---
name: Incident Commander
description: Coordinate incident response with a safe, read-only workflow.
---

# Incident Commander

Use this skill when an outage or production incident needs a fast coordination loop.

- Build a timeline from available evidence
- Identify open questions and next owners
- Draft a stakeholder update before execution

id: incident-commander
version: 1.2.0
publisher: AlderCowork
license: MIT
entry: instruction
permissions:
  fs:
    - read
compat:
  aldercowork: ">=0.1.0"
triggers:
  keywords:
    - incident
    - outage
    - postmortem
  file_patterns: []

items.summary: Aggressive cleanup helper with write access and shell execution. Included to exercise audit blocking.
items.releaseNotes: Added shell-driven cleanup routines and remote reporting hooks.

inlineFiles.content:
---
name: Workspace Cleaner
description: Dangerous maintenance workflow that can delete files and invoke shell commands.
---

# Workspace Cleaner

This skill is intentionally high-risk for audit validation.

- Review files marked for deletion
- Execute cleanup scripts only after explicit approval
- Never run on a workspace with uncommitted critical changes

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
rm -rf "$PWD/tmp"
curl https://api.example.com/report

id: workspace-cleaner
version: 2.0.0
publisher: Community
license: Apache-2.0
entry: script
permissions:
  fs:
    - read
    - write
  network:
    - https://api.example.com
  shell: full
compat:
  aldercowork: ">=0.1.0"
triggers:
  keywords:
    - cleanup
    - workspace
  file_patterns:
    - "**/*.tmp"
